div.div:
Key Finding: 20 services, single PSC endpoint, zero infrastructure changes ❶ PSC endpoint (10.0.0.100) → all-apis bundle ❷ DNS wildcard *.run.app → PSC IP (covers ALL services) ❸ PSC tunnels to Google API frontend ❹ Cloud Run receives request (any of 20 services)
Adding services requires ONLY: gcloud run deploy (no networking changes). PSC endpoint, DNS zone, firewall rules, and VPN config are identical to single-service Option C.
